title: Ore Silverfish Mod
description: A mod that add Infested ore blocks and ore Based Silverfish entity
body:
Experience a new challenge in your Minecraft world with the Ore Silverfish mod! This unique mod introduces infested ore blocks that harbor ore-like silverfish, adding an element of surprise and danger to your mining adventures.



Features you will find:

  • Iron Silverfish - Found in Iron Infested Ore, these crafty critters are ready to protect their iron stash at all costs.
  • Gold Silverfish - Harvesting gold has never been more dangerous with the Gold Infested Ore hiding these sneaky golden guardians.
  • Copper Silverfish - Copper Infested Ore comes with a surprise as copper-infused silverfish defend their territory.
  • Coal Silverfish - Mining Coal Infested Ore is no longer safe! Watch out for these dark little nuisances.
  • Emerald Silverfish - Emerald Infested Ore holds emerald-loving silverfish ready to spring when you dig too deep.
  • Lapis Silverfish - These blue-hued silverfish wait in Lapis Infested Ore, lurking until you make your move.
  • Redstone Silverfish - Redstone Infested Ore holds a shocking surprise—redstone-infused silverfish!
  • Diamond Silverfish - Mining diamonds is a high-risk task now, with Diamond Silverfish guarding these precious gems.
  • Ancient Debris Silverfish - These rare and powerful silverfish lie hidden in Ancient Debris Infested Ore, adding a dangerous twist to your Netherite mining. Approach with caution!

Special Boss Encounter (WIP)

  • Mother Ore Silverfish - Encounter the ultimate boss lurking beneath the depths! The Mother Ore Silverfish is a massive, fearsome guardian of the infested ores, waiting to defend her minions with powerful attacks and relentless defense. Prepare your best gear and strategy to take down this formidable foe.

The Altar Room (WIP)

A mysterious new Altar Room is being introduced, designed to summon the Mother Ore Silverfish under specific conditions. Currently a work-in-progress, this room will feature the BossAltarBlock surrounded by PedestalBlocks where players will need to place specific items to awaken the boss. The summoning ritual is not for the faint-hearted, as it consumes valuable materials and triggers an intense battle!
